NGIS PHASE 3 — SPRINT REVIEW MEETING MINUTES
Meeting Date: March 3, 2026
Time: 13:00–14:30 EST
Location: WebEx / Room 4C-12, Place du Portage III, Gatineau

Attendees:
- Alice Tran (Project Manager) — Chair
- Bob Morrison (Technical Lead)
- Carol Nguyen (Infrastructure Architect)
- Dave Chen (Security Specialist)
- Marie Lefebvre (Change Management)
- Farida Osei (QA Lead)

Regrets: Director Okafor (represented by Alice Tran)

---

1. SPRINT 6 REVIEW (Feb 17 – Mar 3, 2026)

Completed Items:
- AD Schema Extension deployed to test environment (Bob Morrison)
- Network topology design finalized for Sites B and C (Carol Nguyen)
- User acceptance testing scripts drafted (Farida Osei)
- Legacy application inventory completed — 14 apps catalogued (Dave Chen)

Incomplete / Carried Forward:
- PAW architecture documentation for SA&A package (blocked — see Item 3)
- End-user communication plan (in progress — 60% complete)

2. DEMO

Bob Morrison demonstrated the Active Directory migration wizard in the
staging environment. The pilot migration of 120 test accounts completed
successfully with zero errors. Rollback mechanism tested and confirmed
functional.

3. BLOCKERS AND RISKS

a) Vendor Delay: TechSupplier has confirmed a 2-week delay on Cisco
   Catalyst 9500 switches. Revised delivery is March 20. This threatens
   the March 18 migration window. Carol to assess impact on Site A cutover.

b) Compliance Gap: TBS Audit identified an ITSG-33 IA-5 finding
   (see separate email from TBS). Dave Chen confirmed the PAW
   documentation was inadvertently omitted from the SA&A package.

c) Resource Risk: Bob Morrison has indicated he is exploring external
   opportunities and may be leaving SSC within 60 days. Knowledge
   transfer plan must be initiated immediately given his role as the
   sole AD migration expert. HR to be notified.

d) Technical Dependency: The current migration script relies on the
   deprecated "legacy-sync" API endpoint scheduled for decommission
   on April 1. Bob to assess refactoring effort.

4. SPRINT 7 PLANNING (Mar 4 – Mar 17, 2026)

5. ACTION ITEMS

AI-001: Alice Tran to contact TechSupplier Account Manager for revised
        delivery commitment in writing. Deadline: March 5, 2026.

AI-002: Bob Morrison to complete knowledge transfer documentation for AD
        migration procedures and hand off to Carol Nguyen.
        Deadline: March 17, 2026.

AI-003: Dave Chen to prepare and submit updated SA&A documentation
        (PAW architecture, IA-5 controls) to TBS audit office.
        Deadline: March 12, 2026.

AI-004: Farida Osei to complete and distribute UAT test plan to all
        stakeholders for review. Deadline: March 10, 2026.

AI-005: Carol Nguyen to conduct impact assessment on Site A cutover
        timeline given vendor delay. Present findings to steering
        committee. Deadline: March 7, 2026.

6. NEXT MEETING

Sprint 7 Review: March 17, 2026, 13:00–14:30 EST

Minutes recorded by: Marie Lefebvre
Approved by: Alice Tran
